extensionName.description: The display name of the extension shown in the browser UI.

extensionDescription.message: Real-time video playback quality monitoring with stability scoring, freeze prediction, and actionable advisories.
extensionDescription.description: The description shown on the extensions management page.

popupTitle.description: Title shown at the top of the popup.

popupNoVideo.description: Message shown in the popup when no video element is found on the active tab.

popupNoVideoHint.message: Navigate to a page with a playing video to begin monitoring stability.
popupNoVideoHint.description: Hint text shown below the no-video message.

scoreLabel.description: Label for the overall stability score gauge.

factorBufferHealth.description: Label for the buffer health scoring factor.

factorDropRate.description: Label for the frame drop rate scoring factor.

factorStallFrequency.description: Label for the stall frequency scoring factor.

factorBitrateStability.description: Label for the bitrate stability scoring factor.

factorDecodePerformance.description: Label for the decode performance scoring factor.

metricBitrate.description: Label for the current stream bitrate metric card.

metricBandwidth.description: Label for the available network bandwidth metric card.

metricDropRate.description: Label for the frame drop rate metric card.

metricDecodeTime.description: Label for the average frame decode time metric card.

metricStalls.description: Label for the stall count display.

predictionTitle.description: Section heading for the freeze prediction panel.

predictionSafe.description: Status message when no freeze is expected.

predictionWarn.description: Status message when a freeze is considered likely.

predictionProbability.description: Label for the freeze probability value.

predictionEstTime.description: Label for the estimated time until freeze.

predictionConfidence.description: Label for the prediction confidence tier.

advisoryTitle.description: Section heading for the advisory list.

advisoryNone.description: Message shown when there are no active advisories.

advisorySuggestedActions.description: Sub-heading for the list of actions within an advisory card.

settingsPlaybackMode.description: Settings section heading for playback mode selection.

settingsNotifications.description: Settings section heading for notification controls.

settingsSampling.description: Settings section heading for sampling interval controls.

settingsSiteAllowlist.description: Settings section heading for the site allowlist.

settingsAdvanced.description: Settings section heading for advanced options.

settingsAppearance.description: Settings section heading for theme selection.

settingsReset.description: Settings section heading for the reset action.

btnReset.description: Reset button label in the danger zone.

btnConfirmReset.description: Confirmation button for the reset action.

statusSaving.description: Status banner text while settings are being saved.

statusSaved.description: Status banner text after successful save.

statusError.description: Status banner text when saving fails.
